aboutUs.title: Who are we?
aboutUs.missionContent: We are a platform dedicated to reading and cataloguing manga, manhwa, and manhua. Our mission is to bring passionate readers together and create a vibrant community around Asian comics.
aboutUs.offerContent: An extensive catalogue of works, a personal library system, discussion forums, reading groups, and much more. All in one place, free and without ads.
aboutUs.communityContent: We believe the best reading experience is a shared one. That's why we invest in tools that connect readers, translators, and fans from around the world.

publishWork.title: Publish work
publishWork.description1: If you are an author and wish to publish your work on our platform, get in touch with us. We accept manga, webtoons, fanfics, fanarts, and other creative works.
publishWork.description2: Fill in the form below with information about your work and we will get in touch shortly.
